## User preferences

- when the user says “你解决这个问题，只能在automation显示”, treat sidebar duplication and stray run threads as a real workflow bug, not a cosmetic annoyance [Task 2]
- when the user says the workspace name “和乱码一样，搞个干净一点的”, prefer aliases/symlinks and prompt cleanup over moving the real project directories [Task 2]
- when the user says “全部不能用” about automations, start with a mixed-cause health diagnostic across app config, target directories, schedule contracts, and auth state before changing business-repo code [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- when a DWS-backed automation family is unhealthy, fail closed on auth expiry and route the next step to browser/device authorization or keepalive validation rather than pretending the scheduler itself is dead [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- when the user asks to avoid overly frequent DWS auth reminders and wants a “最后提醒/检查” near refresh expiry, prefer the tuned keepalive cadence plus a last-window reminder over noisy frequent notifications [Task 3] [chronicle memory]

## Reusable knowledge

- The shared DWS/KMFA automation cwd pair is `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] plus `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] DWS archive work stays in the first directory, while KMFA git/skill/test/script execution belongs in `CodexProject` [Task 1]
- The six aligned automations were `dws`, `dingtalk-dws-archive-weekly-maintenance-review`, `automation-3`, `automation-4`, `dingtalk-routine-check`, and `kmfa`; the handoff package encoded their current validation state, latest DWS evidence, and takeover sequence in `work/dws_kmfa_automation_handoff_20260708.md` plus `work/dws_kmfa_automation_takeover_prompt_20260708.md` [Task 1]
- Clean alias symlinks are the lowest-risk way to make these workspaces readable in Codex Desktop: `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] and `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [Task 2]
- For app-side automation updates, verify `~/.codex/automations/<id>/automation.toml` after changes; placeholder-style prompt updates can overwrite the real prompt text if the original content is not restored immediately [Task 2]
- The July 9 diagnostic showed the apparent “all broken” state was actually mixed: some automations were paused, some `cwd` targets had moved or disappeared, the KMFA fund-weekly automation had a schedule/prompt mismatch, and the DWS-backed flows were blocked by expired DingTalk/DWS auth rather than scheduler death [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- `DWS Auth Keepalive | 钉钉认证自动保活` became a meaningful control surface in Scheduled alongside `上海每日钉钉DWS归档`, `每日早晚钉钉考勤检查 | 晚报`, `钉钉工作检查`, `CodexProject 主仓库每日维护`, and `Codex session 归档备份删除`; use it to verify token freshness before rerunning DWS-dependent automations [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- The visible July 9 recovery sequence was: restore `kmfa` to `FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,SA;BYHOUR=11;BYMINUTE=0`, confirm `authenticated=true` / `token_valid=true` for `武汉开明高新科技有限公司`, then separate the remaining issue as DWS discovery / GitHub release timeouts rather than auth loss [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- The keepalive automation evolved during the same window: first visible at `00:20 / 06:20 / 12:20 / 18:20`, then tuned to every 4 hours with a 24-hour reminder and a final reminder/check in the last 4-hour window before refresh expiry [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- `dws doctor` and `dws auth login --device` are the practical recovery handles to explain or validate this family: `doctor` checks login/network/cache/version state, while device login is the manual re-auth path once refresh automation can no longer recover on its own [Task 3] [chronicle memory]

## Failures and how to do differently

- Do not move the real DWS project directory just to make Codex Desktop prettier; use alias symlinks so absolute paths in repo docs, handoffs, and automations remain valid [Task 2]
- If `automation_update` writes a placeholder prompt like `__PRESERVE_EXISTING_PROMPT__`, restore the original prompt from readback immediately; treat placeholder updates as destructive unless proven otherwise [Task 2]
- Do not collapse a mixed automation outage into one root cause. July 9 showed three distinct classes: paused tasks, missing target directories, and DWS-auth / schedule-contract issues [Task 3] [chronicle memory]
- If DWS browser authorization succeeds but automation health still disagrees, compare `dws auth status --format json`, `dws doctor`, and the automation runtime’s visible state before claiming recovery; the useful stop rule is whether the automation environment can read the same valid token state [Task 3] [chronicle memory]

## [REDACTED_PHONE] Fund Automation Entrypoint Recovery

Scope: fix `kmfa-5` so the scheduled entrypoint can recover from a missing
fund hot folder without bypassing the source-readiness gate.

Observed state:

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `kmfa-5` automation contract | Active, weekly Monday/Saturday 11:00 local Sydney time, CodexProject workspace. |
| Configured source folder | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] was missing before the entrypoint smoke. |
| Source zip candidates | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] and `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] were readable. |
| First source readiness | `SOURCE_MISSING`; runner was not started. |

Root cause:

- The fund weekly skill already had a safe `materialize_fund_source.py` tool,
  and `check_source_readiness.py` could point at the DWS zip candidate, but the
  scheduled shell entrypoint did not perform the explicit materialization step.
  Any cleanup or OneDrive hot-folder loss could therefore make `kmfa-5`
  repeatedly unavailable even though the latest DWS zip was healthy.
- The runner and delivery-acceptance helpers still compared the schedule against
  the pre-normalized RRULE string without the `RRULE:` prefix. The live Codex
  automation and tracked contract had already moved to
  `RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,SA;BYHOUR=11;BYMINUTE=0`, so generated run
  packages could incorrectly mark the automation schedule gate as mismatch even
  when the card was correct.

Fix:

- `tools/run_daily_local.sh` now handles only readiness exit `2`
  (`SOURCE_MISSING`) by explicitly materializing `付款请示群` from the configured
  DWS zip candidate, then rerunning `check_source_readiness.py`.
- The runner still starts only after the second readiness check returns
  `READY`; other readiness failures remain fail-closed and do not trigger
  materialization.
- `tools/run_fund_weekly_analysis.py` and `tools/check_delivery_acceptance.py`
  now use the same RRULE string as the tracked `kmfa-5` contract.
- Added a regression test covering this exact call order:
  readiness `SOURCE_MISSING` -> materialize zip -> readiness `READY` -> runner.

Validation:

| Evidence | Result |
|---|---|
| Focused regression tests | `Ran 3 tests ... OK`. |
| Full fund weekly tests | `Ran 71 tests ... OK`. |
| Real scheduled-entrypoint smoke | First smoke: readiness `SOURCE_MISSING`; materialized 292 `付款请示群` files from `DWS_Outputs.zip`; second readiness `READY`; runner reached `INDEXED_PENDING_EXTRACTION`. Post-fix smoke: readiness directly `READY`; runner reached `INDEXED_PENDING_EXTRACTION`. OCR engine intentionally set to `none`; Codex handoff intentionally skipped. |
| Hot source folder after smoke | 292 files present under the configured fund input folder. |
| Fund taskpack / automation / source checks | Taskpack static validation `PASS`; `check_codex_app_automation.py` returned `CODEX_AUTOMATION_READY`; source readiness returned `READY` with 292 files and 0 unreadable files. |

Safety notes:

- This is not silent fallback. The entrypoint logs the materialization action and
  still requires a fresh readiness pass before extraction.
- The materialization is group-scoped to `付款请示群`; other DWS groups are not
  copied into the fund input folder.

+# KMFA Automation Bug Log
+
+## [REDACTED_PHONE] Recovery
+
+Scope: restore and verify the five KMFA-related Codex Desktop automations without
+sending production group messages. Live attendance validation used the personal
+DWS chat target for Zhang Linze only.
+
+Current active KMFA automation se[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] ID | Name | Workspace | Expected state |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| `kmfa-dws` | `KMFA｜上游每日钉钉DWS归档` | DWS archive project | Active |
+| `kmfa` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晨报` | CodexProject | Active |
+| `kmfa-3` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晚报` | CodexProject | Active |
+| `kmfa-4` | `KMFA｜钉钉工作检查` | CodexProject | Active |
+| `kmfa-5` | `KMFA｜资金周报自动化` | CodexProject | Active |
+
+Root causes and fixe[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] Issue | Impact | Fix | Validation |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| Raw edits and backup copies under `~/.codex/automations` caused Codex Desktop registry/card drift and orphaned old IDs. | KMFA cards disappeared or appeared under wrong workspaces. | Recovered the active cards with the official Codex automation update path; active KMFA cards are now bound only to CodexProject, while upstream DWS archive stays in the DWS project. | Current registry check shows `kmfa-dws`, `kmfa`, `kmfa-3`, `kmfa-4`, and `kmfa-5` active. |
+| S19 personal notification target had public manifest metadata but missing private resolved runtime target. | Personal-only tests could not prove delivery without risking group sends. | Resolved the private Zhang Linze DWS personal target in ignored private runtime; production group robot config remains unused for the test. | Morning and evening personal-only reruns dispatched exactly one personal DWS chat target and no group target. |
+| DWS `attendance record get` may return `AGENT_CODE_NOT_EXISTS` for one member while the summary endpoint succeeds. | A valid run was incorrectly marked `PARTIAL`. | Added summary-backed `record_detail_unavailable` classification; this does not count as a command failure. | `python3 -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_dingtalk_attendance -q` includes the regression. |
+| DWS `attendance summary` may return `AGENT_CODE_NOT_EXISTS` while the daily record endpoint has complete on/off-duty evidence. | Evening run could remain `PARTIAL` even with usable daily record evidence. | Added record-backed `summary_detail_unavailable` classification; it only applies when record evidence is successful and complete. | Evening personal-only rerun completed with `command_failure_count=0`. |
+| DWS department discovery may return a transient empty failure without a useful error code. | One temporary DWS response could abort the whole automation with an undiagnosable blank error. | Empty DWS failures are now retried, and final failures include a readable failure label. | Unit regression covers an empty first failure followed by success. |
+| Sensitive scanner flagged schema text such as `credential_secret=false`. | Valid public manifests could fail safety validation. | Refined assignment-style secret detection to avoid underscore-prefixed schema fields while still catching bare `secret=`. | Sensitive scan passes for tracked KMFA files. |
+| Fund automation source folder was missing after cleanup. | `kmfa-5` source readiness returned `SOURCE_MISSING`. | Materialized the fund source from the OneDrive DWS zip into the expected local hot folder. | Source readiness now returns `READY` with 298 files. |
+| DWS archive automation tried to commit the raw `DWS_Outputs.zip` to GitHub. | The raw package is too large for normal GitHub commits and should not cross the public metadata boundary. | Changed the DWS backup contract and `kmfa-dws` prompt to commit manifest/hash/run summary only; raw zip remains in OneDrive. | `KMFA/metadata/dws_outputs_backup/latest/manifest.json` and `runs/20260709T215022.json` record size, SHA-256, file count, run summary, and validation status. |
+
+Verification evidenc[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] Area | Result |
+|---|---|
+| S19 morning personal-only live rerun | `COMPLETED`; DWS live; one personal DWS chat target; no group target; `command_failure_count=0`. |
+| S19 evening personal-only live rerun | `COMPLETED`; DWS live; one personal DWS chat target; no group target; `command_failure_count=0`. |
+| S20 daily routine dry-run | Morning and evening windows evaluated expected rules from the DWS zip input without sending notifications. |
+| S21 fund automation readiness | Codex automation readiness passed; source readiness passed after materialization; wrapper smoke indexed 298 files with OCR disabled for low-resource validation. |
+| Upstream DWS archive | Controlled run succeeded; output validation passed; OneDrive mirror file count 996; cold storage validation passed. |
+| DWS auth keepalive | `dws doctor` reported login/network/cache pass and only a version-update warning. |
+
+Validation commands ru[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_dingtalk_attendance -q
+python3 KMFA/tools/dingtalk_attendance/validate_no_sensitive_git.py
+python3 KMFA/kmfa-dingtalk-attendance-skill/tools/validate_skill_package.py

# 钉钉DWS归档 / DWS 全文件原始数据归档

“钉钉DWS归档”只指 **DWS 全文件原始数据归档 skill**。它不负责周报、月报、业务报告、业务分析结论或经营判断。

## 固定位置

- 项目目录：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 管理文档：`README.md`
- Notion 管理页：`http[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 主脚本：`scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py`
- 目标配置：`config/target_groups.yaml`
- SQLite manifest：`data/all_files_manifest.sqlite3`
- Codex 受控每日 wrapper：`scripts/run_daily.sh`
- Codex 受控每周 wrapper：`scripts/run_weekly.sh`
- Notion skill/config 同步：`scripts/sync_notion_skill_backup.py`
- 当前 OneDrive 包：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 冷存储目录：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 临时构建目录：`~/Downloads/DWS_Outputs/`

历史兼容旧数据只可作为只读参考：`scripts/dingtalk_dws_archive.py`、`config/targets.yaml`、`data/messages.sqlite3` 不是当前主路径。

## 运行边界

- 只允许 Codex automation 或用户手动让 Codex 唤起脚本。
- 不允许本机 `launchd` 或本地脚本无人值守自动跑。
- `scripts/run_daily.sh`、`scripts/run_weekly.sh` 没有 `DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1` 时必须拒绝运行。
- launchd plist 保留但必须 disabled/deprecated。
- 当前 Codex automation 名称：`每日钉钉DWS归档`，每天 11:00 和 19:00。
- 旧 automation `钉钉 DWS Archive 每日运行检查` 应删除。
- 增删改目标群时，必须同步检查并更新 Codex automation；automation 不得硬编码旧群清单，验证应从 `config/target_groups.yaml` 动态读取所有 enabled 群。

Codex 手动运行：

```sh
DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 DWS_RUN_SOURCE=codex_manual /bin/sh scripts/run_daily.sh
```

Codex automation 运行：

```sh
DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 DWS_RUN_SOURCE=codex_automation DWS_AUTOMATION_NAME="每日钉钉DWS归档" /bin/sh scripts/run_daily.sh
```

运行前必须展示本次会处理哪些群、哪些跳过、cursor 起点和预计风险。运行后必须写中文人类可读报告，并附机器 JSON。

## 群配置模型

`config/target_groups.yaml` 是唯一当前配置入口。

- `scan_mode` 只能是 `auto` 或 `manual_only`。
- `auto`：Codex automation 触发时可主动扫描。
- `manual_only`：automation 不主动扫描，只能用户显式指定手动补扫、重建包、查历史。
- `manual_only` 群不会主动调用 DWS 扫描，但当前包仍必须从历史 manifest/messages 重建该群目录和质量证据，不能因为跳过扫描而从 `DWS_Outputs.zip` 消失。
- `group_type: standing`：常驻群，长期 auto，不因日期自动停止。
- `group_type: project`：项目群，必须有 `start_date`、`completed_date`、`grace_days`；成功增量扫描确认连续 7 天无新增消息和文件时，自动记录最后一次有消息的时间为 `completed_at`/`completed_date`，并把 `scan_mode` 转为 `manual_only`。
- `2026年商务部报价群` 是 standing/auto，不再按项目生命周期处理。

## Cursor 与 backoff

- 每群维护独立 cursor，记录在 SQLite `group_cursors`。
- 下一次 auto 扫描从该群 cursor 之后开始。
- 不再每日从 `[REDACTED_PHONE]` 或 start_date 做全量扫描。
- 手动 full reconciliation 必须显式传 `--full-reconciliation`。
- cursor 只有在本轮扫描到 `hasMore=false` 后才更新。
- 每个资源最多主动尝试 3 次；超过后 `exhausted=1`，不再每日主动重试。
- 用户显式 `--retry-exhausted` 才补扫 exhausted。
- 长时间跨度的常驻群和项目群是正常对象，不是异常。
- 全时、全盘、全量、深度完整收集是硬要求：不得为了让 automation 更快结束而截断页数、缩短时间窗、跳过历史资源、只扫最近消息或抽样。
- 长跨度扫描必须依靠每群 cursor、heartbeat 和可恢复报告保证可观测性；只要 heartbeat 或 DWS 子进程仍在推进，就不得直接判为失败。
- 真正阻塞必须基于无 heartbeat、无日志增长、无 DWS 子进程进展且超过 `stale_heartbeat_minutes_before_blocked`。
- DWS 网络韧性：所有 DWS CLI 调用必须显式传 `--timeout`，当前 `dws_http_timeout_seconds=120`；遇到 `io_timeout`、`request_timeout`、`dial tcp`、`context deadline` 等瞬态网络错误时最多按 `dws_command_retries=3` 重试，退避基准 `dws_retry_backoff_seconds=5` 秒。
- 项目群自动完工：当本轮扫描成功到 `hasMore=false`，本轮无新增消息、无新增文件信号，且距 `group_cursors.last_message_time_seen` 已满 `project_auto_complete_idle_days=7` 天，脚本自动写回 `config/target_groups.yaml`，将该项目群转为 `manual_only`；后续 automation 不主动扫描，但允许用户显式补扫、重建包、查历史。

## 热/冷存储

- 当前交付包：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- `DWS_Outputs.zip` 只包含最近 60 天热数据。
- `~/Downloads/DWS_Outputs/` 只是临时构建输出，当前包验证通过后删除。
- 60 天及以上文件本体迁入 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 冷存储不使用年份目录，不生成 zip。
- 历史残留的冷存储 `files/MMDD/` 会在真实运行中安全迁移为 `files/MM/`，并同步更新 SQLite manifest 路径。
- 冷存储文件不进入当前 `DWS_Outputs.zip`。
- 本机 `data/archive/` 只保留最近 60 天文件本体。
- SQLite manifest 永久保留：群名、消息 ID、消息时间、文件名、hash、size、resource_id 内部记录、原本地路径、冷存储文件路径、冷存储相对路径、`storage_tier`。

## 清理规则

- `data/staging/` 超过 24 小时可清理；清理前确认没有其他正在运行的 DWS 归档进程。
- `logs/` 只保留 15 天；旧日志先写中文摘要到 Notion，再删除本机旧日志。
- 日志摘要不得包含 token、open_conversation_id、完整 resource_id、cookie 或账号敏感信息。
- 不删除 `data/all_files_manifest.sqlite3`、manifest 历史记录、reports 必要质量证据、Notion 同步状态或冷存储文件。

## Notion 同步

skill/config 变化后必须同步 Notion：

- 有 token 用 API。
- 没 token 用 Notion connector；本项目 automation 视为允许使用 connector 读写 Notion。
- connector 不可用再尝试 Chrome/computer-use。
- 都失败则写 `reports/notion_skill_backup_pending.md`，最终报告明确 pending 路径。
- Notion 只写中文摘要和关键指标，不写敏感 ID。

## 验收口径

- `python3 -m py_compile scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py scripts/weekly_dws_smoke.py scripts/sync_notion_skill_backup.py scripts/validate_dws_output_structure.py` 通过。
- `/bin/sh -n scripts/run_daily.sh scripts/run_weekly.sh` 通过。
- launchd plist 如保留必须 lint 通过且 disabled/deprecated。
- 当前 `DWS_Outputs.zip` 只含热数据。
- 冷存储目录存在，按群名分目录，无年份目录，无 zip，文件路径可追溯。
- Downloads 临时输出已删除。
- 每群没有 `<群名>_latest.zip`。
- `files/MM` 结构正确；`files/MMDD`、`files/YYYY/MM/DD` 或更深日期目录都不允许。
- manifest/missing/status/chat_records 存在。
- cursor 已更新或明确未更新原因。
- exhausted 资源不再主动重试。
- 中文可读报告和机器 JSON 附录存在。
- Notion 同步成功或 pending 明确。

## 输出格式

默认中文，简短列出：

- 进度百分比
- 已完成
- 未完成
- 关键证据
- 风险/阻塞
- 推荐下一步

---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence ≠ evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter ≠ compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion ≠ excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
✅ [Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
❌ "Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
✅ Write → Run (pass) → Revert fix → Run (MUST FAIL) → Restore → Run (pass)
❌ "I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
✅ [Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
❌ "Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
✅ Re-read plan → Create checklist → Verify each → Report gaps or completion
❌ "Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
✅ Agent reports success → Check VCS diff → Verify changes → Report actual state
❌ Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion → redirect → rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.

HANDOFF=[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -f "$HANDOFF"
test -f "$BUGLOG"
test -f "$ROLLOUT"
test -f "$RECEIPT"
test "$(git -C [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] rev-parse HEAD)" = "$(git -C [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] rev-parse origin/main)"

    14	| Tracked prompt mirrors still referenced the old July 5 worktree or stale automation ids. | Future agents could recreate the same bad live configuration from stale repo docs. | Updated fund prompt, attendance SKILL/manifest/validator, and daily routine manifest to current ids and canonical cwd. | Attendance skill package, daily routine skill package, and fund taskpack validators pass. |
    15	| Upstream DWS archive was separate but KMFA prompts previously described mixed cwd usage. | KMFA tasks could drift back into the DWS archive workspace and duplicate resource-heavy archive work. | KMFA prompts now state that KMFA automations run only from `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] DWS archive remains separate producer automation. | Live `kmfa-dws` remains bound only to the DWS project cwd; KMFA tasks do not include that cwd. |
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Current active KMFA automation set after repair:
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	| ID | Name | Project id | Cwd | Expected state |
    20	|---|---|---|---|---|
    21	| `kmfa` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晨报` | `40dd52a0-b6eb-[REDACTED_PHONE]cb5f4f86e3e` | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | Active |
    22	| `kmfa-3` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晚报` | `40dd52a0-b6eb-[REDACTED_PHONE]cb5f4f86e3e` | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | Active |
    23	| `kmfa-4` | `KMFA｜钉钉工作检查` | `40dd52a0-b6eb-[REDACTED_PHONE]cb5f4f86e3e` | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | Active |
    24	| `kmfa-5` | `KMFA｜资金周报自动化` | `40dd52a0-b6eb-[REDACTED_PHONE]cb5f4f86e3e` | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | Active |
    25	| `kmfa-dws` | `KMFA｜上游每日钉钉DWS归档` | `cbf3c45e-f4ad-47d7-b397-faf7e3dea35e` | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | Active |
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Validation commands run:
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	```text
    30	python3 KMFA/fund-weekly-analysis-skill/tools/check_codex_app_automation.py
    31	python3 KMFA/kmfa-dingtalk-attendance-skill/tools/validate_skill_package.py
    32	python3 KMFA/daily_routine_check_skill/tools/validate_skill_package.py
    33	python3 KMFA/fund-weekly-analysis-skill/tools/validate_taskpack.py
    34	python3 -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_dingtalk_attendance -q
    35	python3 -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_daily_routine_check -q
    36	python3 KMFA/fund-weekly-analysis-skill/tools/check_source_readiness.py --repo-root [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] --timezone Australia/Sydney
    37	dws doctor --format json
    38	/usr/bin/python3 scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py --plan-only --run-source codex_automation --automation-name 每日钉钉DWS归档
    39	python3 KMFA/tools/dingtalk_attendance/healthcheck.py --config-only
    40	```
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Observed validation result:
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	- Attendance tests: 66 tests passed.
    45	- Daily routine tests: 19 tests passed.
    46	- Fund source readiness: `READY`, file_count `292`, unreadable_count `0`.
    47	- DWS doctor: 3 pass, 1 version warning, 0 fail.
    48	- DWS archive plan-only: success, 9 groups planned.
    49	- Attendance healthcheck: `READY`, DWS command safety ready, multi-target notification ready with 张霖泽 personal target available.
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	## [REDACTED_PHONE] Recovery
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Scope: restore and verify the five KMFA-related Codex Desktop automations without
    54	sending production group messages. Live attendance validation used the personal
    55	DWS chat target for Zhang Linze only.
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Current active KMFA automation set:
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	| ID | Name | Workspace | Expected state |
    60	|---|---|---|---|
    61	| `kmfa-dws` | `KMFA｜上游每日钉钉DWS归档` | DWS archive project | Active |
    62	| `kmfa` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晨报` | CodexProject | Active |
    63	| `kmfa-3` | `KMFA｜每日钉钉考勤检查｜晚报` | CodexProject | Active |
    64	| `kmfa-4` | `KMFA｜钉钉工作检查` | CodexProject | Active |
    65	| `kmfa-5` | `KMFA｜资金周报自动化` | CodexProject | Active |
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	Root causes and fixes:
    [REDACTED_PHONE]	| Issue | Impact | Fix | Validation |
    70	|---|---|---|---|
    71	| Raw edits and backup copies under `~/.codex/automations` caused Codex Desktop registry/card drift and orphaned old IDs. | KMFA cards disappeared or appeared under wrong workspaces. | Recovered the active cards with the official Codex automation update path; active KMFA cards are now bound only to CodexProject, while upstream DWS archive stays in the DWS project. | Current registry check shows `kmfa-dws`, `kmfa`, `kmfa-3`, `kmfa-4`, and `kmfa-5` active. |
    72	| S19 personal notification target had public manifest metadata but missing private resolved runtime target. | Personal-only tests could not prove delivery without risking group sends. | Resolved the private Zhang Linze DWS personal target in ignored private runtime; production group robot config remains unused for the test. | Morning and evening personal-only reruns dispatched exactly one personal DWS chat target and no group target. |
    73	| DWS `attendance record get` may return `AGENT_CODE_NOT_EXISTS` for one member while the summary endpoint succeeds. | A valid run was incorrectly marked `PARTIAL`. | Added summary-backed `record_detail_unavailable` classification; this does not count as a command failure. | `python3 -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_dingtalk_attendance -q` includes the regression. |
    74	| DWS `attendance summary` may return `AGENT_CODE_NOT_EXISTS` while the daily record endpoint has complete on/off-duty evidence. | Evening run could remain `PARTIAL` even with usable daily record evidence. | Added record-backed `summary_detail_unavailable` classification; it only applies when record evidence is successful and complete. | Evening personal-only rerun completed with `command_failure_count=0`. |
    75	| DWS department discovery may return a transient empty failure without a useful error code. | One temporary DWS response could abort the whole automation with an undiagnosable blank error. | Empty DWS failures are now retried, and final failures include a readable failure label. | Unit regression covers an empty first failure followed by success. |
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	| Check | Result |
   122	|---|---|
   123	| Official Codex automation view | `kmfa-dws`, `kmfa`, `kmfa-3`, `kmfa-4`, and `kmfa-5` rendered successfully. |
   124	| Active top-level KMFA IDs | Only the five expected KMFA automation IDs were active. |
   125	| Old top-level active IDs | None of `dws`, `automation-5`, `automation-6`, `automation-7`, `kmfa-2`, or old keepalive IDs remained. |
   126	| Residual registry clutter | Eight backup/orphan directories still lived directly under the hot `~/.codex/automations` namespace. |
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Root cause:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	- The repeated bug was not only stale active automation TOML. Backup and orphan
   131	  directories were left inside the same hot registry namespace that Codex
   132	  Desktop scans for scheduled cards. Even when active IDs were correct, this
   133	  kept the registry surface noisy and made UI/cache drift easier to reproduce.
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Fix:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	- Moved the eight `_backup_*` and `_orphan_*` directories out of
   138	  `~/.codex/automations` into:
   139	  `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
   140	- Active automation directories were not modified or deleted.
   141	- Future fixes must not store backup copies directly inside
   142	  `~/.codex/automations`; use `~/.codex/automation_backups/` or a repo-private
   143	  evidence path instead.
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	## [REDACTED_PHONE] Fund Automation Entrypoint Recovery
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Scope: fix `kmfa-5` so the scheduled entrypoint can recover from a missing
   148	fund hot folder without bypassing the source-readiness gate.
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Observed state:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	| Check | Result |
   153	|---|---|
   154	| `kmfa-5` automation contract | Active, weekly Monday/Saturday 11:00 local Sydney time, CodexProject workspace. |
   155	| Configured source folder | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] was missing before the entrypoint smoke. |
   156	| Source zip candidates | `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] and `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] were readable. |
   157	| First source readiness | `SOURCE_MISSING`; runner was not started. |
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Root cause:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	- The fund weekly skill already had a safe `materialize_fund_source.py` tool,
   162	  and `check_source_readiness.py` could point at the DWS zip candidate, but the
   163	  scheduled shell entrypoint did not perform the explicit materialization step.
   164	  Any cleanup or OneDrive hot-folder loss could therefore make `kmfa-5`
   165	  repeatedly unavailable even though the latest DWS zip was healthy.
   166	- The runner and delivery-acceptance helpers still compared the schedule against
   167	  the pre-normalized RRULE string without the `RRULE:` prefix. The live Codex
   168	  automation and tracked contract had already moved to
   169	  `RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,SA;BYHOUR=11;BYMINUTE=0`, so generated run
   170	  packages could incorrectly mark the automation schedule gate as mismatch even
   171	  when the card was correct.
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Fix:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	- `tools/run_daily_local.sh` now handles only readiness exit `2`
   176	  (`SOURCE_MISSING`) by explicitly materializing `付款请示群` from the configured
   177	  DWS zip candidate, then rerunning `check_source_readiness.py`.
   178	- The runner still starts only after the second readiness check returns
   179	  `READY`; other readiness failures remain fail-closed and do not trigger
   180	  materialization.
   181	- `tools/run_fund_weekly_analysis.py` and `tools/check_delivery_acceptance.py`
   182	  now use the same RRULE string as the tracked `kmfa-5` contract.
   183	- Added a regression test covering this exact call order:
   184	  readiness `SOURCE_MISSING` -> materialize zip -> readiness `READY` -> runner.
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Validation:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	| Evidence | Result |
   189	|---|---|
   190	| Focused regression tests | `Ran 3 tests ... OK`. |
   191	| Full fund weekly tests | `Ran 71 tests ... OK`. |
   192	| Real scheduled-entrypoint smoke | First smoke: readiness `SOURCE_MISSING`; materialized 292 `付款请示群` files from `DWS_Outputs.zip`; second readiness `READY`; runner reached `INDEXED_PENDING_EXTRACTION`. Post-fix smoke: readiness directly `READY`; runner reached `INDEXED_PENDING_EXTRACTION`. OCR engine intentionally set to `none`; Codex handoff intentionally skipped. |
   193	| Hot source folder after smoke | 292 files present under the configured fund input folder. |
   194	| Fund taskpack / automation / source checks | Taskpack static validation `PASS`; `check_codex_app_automation.py` returned `CODEX_AUTOMATION_READY`; source readiness returned `READY` with 292 files and 0 unreadable files. |
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	Safety notes:
   [REDACTED_PHONE]	- This is not silent fallback. The entrypoint logs the materialization action and
   199	  still requires a fresh readiness pass before extraction.
   200	- The materialization is group-scoped to `付款请示群`; other DWS groups are not
   201	  copied into the fund input folder.
   202	- No source files are overwritten by the materializer; conflicts remain
   203	  fail-closed under the existing materialization contract.

payload.message:
结论：handoff 与指定线程最新状态核心一致；“配置修复”已完成，但“稳定自然定时运行”尚未验收，不能按生产闭环宣称 100% 完成。

## 1. 当前 5 个 automation

| ID | 状态 / 工作区 | 期望排程 |
|---|---|---|
| `kmfa` | ACTIVE；`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] | 每日 10:35，`Asia/Shanghai` |
| `kmfa-3` | ACTIVE；同上 | 每日 20:05，`Asia/Shanghai` |
| `kmfa-4` | ACTIVE；同上 | 单一 automation；每日 11:35、17:05，`Asia/Shanghai` |
| `kmfa-5` | ACTIVE；同上 | 周一、周六 11:00，`Australia/Sydney` |
| `kmfa-dws` | ACTIVE；独立 DWS cwd | 每日 11:00、19:00；live RRULE 未写 `TZID`，实际按本机本地时区解释的假设仍需明确 |

四个业务 automation 均绑定 project id `40dd52a0-b6eb-[REDACTED_PHONE]cb5f4f86e3e`；`kmfa-dws` 绑定独立 project id `cbf3c45e-f4ad-47d7-b397-faf7e3dea35e`。五份 live TOML 均已确认不存在旧 July 5 cwd/project id。

## 2. 已确认完成

- 根因确认：四个 KMFA automation 曾错误绑定旧 July 5 `CodexProject`。
- live automation、repo prompt/manifest、drift checker 已改到 canonical `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 修复提交：`c69d00805f`；交接提交：`cfee2cea2f`。
- 当前 `HEAD == origin/main == cfee2cea2f`。
- 历史线程记录的验证包括：
  - Attendance 66 tests；
  - Routine check 19 tests；
  - 三套 skill/taskpack validator；
  - fund source `READY`，292 files，0 unreadable；
  - DWS doctor 3 pass / 1 non-blocking warning / 0 fail；
  - archive plan-only 9 groups。
- personal-only 真测已从私有 receipt 独立复核：
  - `run_id=s19_morning_20260710_103500`
  - `notification_status=SENT`
  - 仅 1 个 personal target，未发群。
- 本轮未重跑上述测试，避免超出历史证据只读核验范围。

## 3. 明确未完成 gate

- 尚无修复/交接后的自然 scheduled trigger。
- 线程于 [REDACTED_PHONE]:10 AEST 完成交接；本次核验约 14:20 AEST。最早后续自然触发预计为：
  - `kmfa-dws`：19:00 AEST；
  - `kmfa-4` evening window：19:05 AEST，即 17:05 北京时间。
- 14:04–14:07 的考勤真测是显式 CLI personal-only run，不是 scheduler 唤醒证据。
- 最小验收：观察最近一次自然 trigger 的 cwd、prompt、run output。
- 完整验收：五个 automation 至少各有一次自然运行成功，且 `kmfa-4` 两个窗口均被正确触发。
- DingTalk 只能证明 `SENT`，无法证明张霖泽手机端已读。

## 4. 矛盾 / 漂移

- Handoff 第 57 行仍写 `HEAD == origin/main == c69d00805f`；最新线程已追加交接提交，实际为 `cfee2cea2f`。属于非实质性文档滞后一提交。
- 线程早期把 `kmfa-4` 的单字段双 `DTSTART/RRULE` 表示判为风险，最终却仍用同一 multiline 形式更新；repo manifest 与 live TOML 当前一致，但 scheduler 是否正确解释只能由自然触发证明。
- `kmfa-dws` handoff 未列排程；live TOML 显示每天 11:00/19:00，但无 `TZID`。这是当前最明确的文档/时区契约缺口。
- Bug log 的 298 files 是 7 月 9 日历史快照；当前最新口径为 292，不应混用。
- 线程最终写“进度 100%”，同时又写“等待下一次自然定时触发”。准确表述应为：配置与交接 100%，端到端 scheduler 稳定性未验收。

## 5. 关键证据与线程转折点

- [Takeover handoff]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- [Bug log]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- Rollout：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
- 私有发送证据：
  - `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]
  - 同名 `.manifest.json`
- 线程转折：
  - `019f4a09-...`：用户明确问题是“不能自动运行/内容有问题”；完成旧 cwd 根因定位、重绑与 `c69d00805f` 推送。
  - `019f4a31-...`：personal-only 真测 `SENT`。
  - `019f4a36-...`：生成 handoff、推送 `cfee2cea2f`，明确自然触发仍未验证。

进度：100%（本次只读核验）。  
未完成：系统侧自然触发验收。  
预计剩余：首次 gate 1 次观察，约等至 19:05 AEST；完整五任务验收约 1–2 次迭代、最长至次日完整排程结束，置信度高。  
推荐下一步：等待 19:00/19:05 自然运行，只读核对 scheduler thread、实际 cwd、prompt 与输出；若失败，先查 scheduler/runtime 日志，不要再次改 prompt。
